holdings.infoBox: EINC is an equity ETF with a total of 31 individual holdings. The top holdings are Enbridge stock at 8.20%, The Williams Companies at 7.59%, TC Energy at 7.01%, Kinder Morgan at 6.57%, and ONEOK at 5.47%.

overview.description: The VanEck Energy Income ETF (EINC) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in energy equity. The fund tracks a market cap-weighted index of North American companies in midstream energy segments. EINC was launched on Mar 13, 2012 and is issued by VanEck.
